[low][be-models-migrations] Model declares index=True on participant_interactions.response_id and post_id but no migration ever creates those single-column indexes
[low][api-contract] Surveys configured with calibration_points > 9 can never be completed by participants (frontend caps calibration at 9 points, backend requires all expected_points)
[low][fe-analytics-i18n] Donut chart's 'Total' and slice semantics are wrong for rate-typed metrics
[low][fe-analytics-i18n] Switching admin UI language triggers an unnecessary analytics refetch and loading flash (and can bounce the admin to /auth)
[low][fe-analytics-i18n] Many analytics UI strings are hardcoded English and never translated for Chinese (supported) admins
[low][fe-calibration-gaze] Dead 'restart from existing stream' branch in calibration retry (stream is always null at that point)
[low][fe-admin-builder] Survey list ignores server-side total and caps at limit=1000, so counts/'Showing X of Y' are wrong past 1000 surveys
[low][fe-survey-runner] Comment edit blurred to empty is silently discarded server-side but kept in local state, causing reload-divergent comment text
[low][fe-survey-runner] Cleared/evicted answers localStorage key permanently blocks Complete because resubmit hits backend 409
[low][fe-survey-runner] Frontend completion gate over-blocks vs backend after un-liking / deleting the only interaction, leaving participant unable to press Complete
[low][be-models-migrations] Tracking/interaction timestamps default to server-local func.now() while all other timestamps are written as naive UTC, mixing time zones in stored data
[low][be-models-migrations] participant_interactions.post_id foreign key has no ON DELETE action while every sibling post FK uses CASCADE/SET NULL
[low][be-tracking-quality] Unbounded NaN/inf in head_rotation can skew calibration stability_score (no numeric validation)
[low][be-export] Exported timestamps are timezone-naive ISO strings with no UTC marker
[low][be-export] Gaze samples ordered by client timestamp_ms with no deterministic tiebreaker
[low][be-translation] language override silently relabels CSV/JSON content under the wrong language code
[low][be-auth-security] OG fetcher trusts attacker-controlled og:image URL without validation, stored and re-served
[low][be-auth-security] User-enumeration timing oracle on login (bcrypt skipped for unknown email)
[low][be-surveys-router] Resume path in start_survey ignores is_preview, allowing a token to resume a response of the opposite preview/real kind
[low][be-surveys-router] Duplicate QuestionResponse possible due to check-then-insert race with no unique constraint
